2325840.name: Denbora
2325840.description:
Break the laws of entropy in Denbora and jump through time to solve complex temporal puzzles. Can you defeat Dirua and the challenges it will put you through?

Each room will require you to use your mental skills to the fullest to decipher the solution to the puzzle. You must not only remember the future but also predict the present with each step you take. Little by little, you will be able to unravel the mystery that has you locked in here.

Through time jumps, Denbora presents a novel puzzle-solving system in which the causality of the player's actions must be taken into account. Through the multiple rooms, the player will learn to use the jumps in time and space that they must master to discover the mystery that plagues these facilities.
2325840.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
